manual_entries.observation: run_ledger.json records repeated blocked judge events for JORB-INFRA-010 citing missing compiled_feature_spec.md, proposal.md, tradeoff_matrix.md, and research_brief.md, while show_status.py currently reports run_state dry_run, current_blocker none, and artifact_missing only judge_decision.md and evidence_bundle.json.
manual_entries.inference: The builder should not show a clean dry-run surface when repeated Phase 4 judge failures for missing artifacts are the strongest recent truth. Tighten operator status truth so artifact-enforcement failures, current blocker, and artifact completeness stay coherent across blocked and dry-run transitions.
manual_entries.content: Harden operator truth for Phase 4 artifact enforcement state
